description: As an Instrumentation, Control, and Electrical (ICE) Technician, I was responsible for maintaining, troubleshooting, and repairing electrical, instrumentation, and control systems to ensure safe, reliable, and efficient plant operations.

As a Crew Store, I was responsible for supporting daily store operations by assisting customers, managing product displays, replenishing inventory, handling cash transactions, and maintaining store cleanliness and organization.
As a Mechanic, I was responsible for inspecting, diagnosing, repairing, and maintaining mechanical equipment and machinery to ensure safe and efficient operation.
